title: AirAsia Cargo India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AirAsia Cargo India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Warehouse Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!
